Press

Media Kit

Everything you need to write about Ferni.

About Ferni

Ferni is a voice-first AI life coaching platform featuring six specialized AI personas who work together to support personal growth. Available 24/7 via web, phone, or API.

Boilerplate

Ferni is someone who remembers your whole story and shows up at 2am with the same presence as noon. With specialized personas—Ferni (life coach), Nayan (wisdom), Peter (research), Alex (communication), Maya (habits), and Jordan (planning)—you get guidance that evolves with you. Ferni remembers every conversation, responds in under 500ms, and can be reached by simply calling a phone number. Based in Park City, Utah, Ferni is on a mission to give everyone access to the kind of support that was once reserved for the privileged few.

Key Facts

6 AI Specialists
<500ms Response Time
24/7 Availability
Free To Start

We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic. Learn more

Cookie Preferences

Essential Cookies

Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.

Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

Functional Cookies

Remember your preferences and settings.
